title: Protocol tool discipline
description: Verify that the agent recalls the constitutional MemQ usage loop and the semantic vs HOT split between the search tools.
query: memq agent protocol memory_status search_memory recent_memory add_memory reflect_memory
prompt: State the required MemQ execution loop for an agent handling non-trivial work. Include when to call memory_status, when to use search_memory versus recent_memory, and when add_memory and reflect_memory should fire.

requiredFacts: Agents should call memory_status before non-trivial work.
Agents should use search_memory for semantic recall and recent_memory for HOT continuity.
Agents should call add_memory after execution and reflect_memory at task or session close.
forbiddenFacts: Agents should skip memory_status and write memory first.
